name: file_access_win_susp_dpapi_master_key_access
raw_query: any where (file.path like~ ("*\\Microsoft\\Protect\\S-1-5-18\\*", "*\\Microsoft\\Protect\\S-1-5-21-*")) and (not (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Windows\\system32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")))
